subcodes.first_line: O God, for the sake of Thy love, will I leave everything and wander in the deserts… To teach is to learn, to learn is to work, to work is to serve, to serve is to love
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @prayer for strength, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @spiritual transformation
